content:
# elizaos/eliza Daily Update (May 2, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on May 2, 2026, focused on stabilizing the agent runtime for headless environments, improving CI reliability on Windows Server 2025, and performing routine dependency maintenance.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

**Runtime Stability and CI Improvements**
*   Resolved a critical process-level segfault on headless Linux servers by bypassing the OS keychain when D-Bus Secret Service is unavailable ([#7230](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7230)).
*   Updated CI smoke tests to correctly handle non-zero exit codes from Inno Setup on Windows Server 2025 ([#7232](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7232)).

**Dependency and Tooling Maintenance**
*   Updated core dependencies, including `viem` to v2.48.8 ([#7237](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7237)) and `tsdown` to ^0.21.0 ([#7236](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7236)).
*   Performed a Node.js version upgrade to v24 ([#7239](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7239)).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   [#7235](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7235): chore: add cloud and plugins, remove rust and python.

## CLOSED ISSUES
*   None.

## NEW ISSUES

**Telegram Integration Challenges**
*   Reported a configuration bridge failure where Telegram bot tokens are not passed from the dashboard to the runtime ([#7240](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7240)).
*   Identified a runtime error under Bun where `bot.launch()` fails due to read-only property assignment ([#7241](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7241)).
*   Identified a race condition caused by dual polling when both the milady wrapper and the Telegram plugin are active ([#7245](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7245)).

**Architecture and Authentication Bugs**
*   Reported duplicate `MiladyClient` class definitions causing prototype fragmentation and undefined methods ([#7233](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7233), [#7244](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7244)).
*   Identified authentication failures in `hasCodexCliSubscriptionAuth` due to outdated `auth.json` schema expectations ([#7238](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7238), [#7243](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7243)).

**Environment Stability**
*   Documented the headless Linux segfault issue related to `@napi-rs/keyring` ([#7231](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7231)).

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   None.
